summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented in Header.tsx: header is no longer sticky/fixed and the logo is centered with improved visibility while preserving image-fallback behavior. However, the diff also adds/changes header navigation menu items that look like new header functionality/routes, which conflicts with the stated non-goals.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/expanded header dropdown navigation entries pointing to additional paths (e.g., /about, /contact, /help, /terms, /privacy), which constitutes new header navigation beyond removing stickiness and improving logo alignment/visibility.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly disallows new navigation routes or new header features beyond removing stickiness and improving logo alignment/visibility; these menu items are not requested in REQ-1/REQ-2.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated project metadata/state tracking (new_feature_requests entries) unrelated to implementing the UI requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only requests frontend header behavior and logo alignment/visibility changes; modifying/adding tracking entries in project_state.json is not requested functionality.
Not requested by the BuildRequest requirements; appears to be auxiliary documentation rather than implementing REQ-1/REQ-2.
